debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
c011 : ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))
⊢ Integrable (fun x => Real.exp (t * x)) (ProbabilityTheory.semicircleReal μ v)

failed_attempts:
have hS : semicircleReal μ v Sᶜ = 0 := by
        by_cases hv : v = 0
        · simp [hv, S, Measure.dirac_apply_compl_self]
        · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero _ hv]
          apply measure_mono_null (fun x hx ↦ mt support_semicirclePDF_inc hx)
          exact withDensity_apply_compl_support (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v)
      apply AEStronglyMeasurable.integrable_of_bounded (by continuity) (Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v)))
      exact (ae_iff.mpr hS).mono c011

· rw [hv, semicircleReal_zero_var]; simp [integrable_dirac, (by continuity : StronglyMeasurable _)]
    · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv, integrable_withDensity_iff (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v)]
      · simp only [toReal_semicirclePDF, smul_eq_mul]
        apply ((Cont_semicirclePDFReal μ v).mul (by continuity)).integrable_of_hasCompactSupport
        exact HasCompactSupport.of_support_subset isCompact_Icc (support_mul_subset_left.trans (support_semicirclePDF_inc μ v))
      · exact ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ semicirclePDF_lt_top
      · continuity

by_cases hv : v = 0
      · simp [hv]; continuity
      · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv, integrable_withDensity_iff (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v) (ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ semicirclePDF_ne_top)]
        apply (by continuity : Continuous (fun x ↦ semicirclePDFReal μ v x * Real.exp (t * x))).integrable_of_hasCompactSupport
        exact HasCompactSupport.of_support_subset isCompact_Icc ((support_mul _ _).trans inter_subset_left |>.trans support_semicirclePDF_inc)
    exact c01
  exact c0.symm ▸ interior_univ.symm.subset (Set.mem_univ p)

have hS : ∀ᵐ x ∂(semicircleReal μ v), x ∈ S := by

        · rw [semicircleReal_of_var_ne_zero μ hv, Measure.ae_withDensity_iff (measurable_semicirclePDF μ v)]
          exact ae_of_all _ (fun x hx ↦ support_semicirclePDF_inc μ v (by simpa [semicirclePDF] using hx))
      exact (continuous_exp.comp (continuous_id.const_mul t)).stronglyMeasurable.aestronglyMeasurable.integrable_of_bounded _ (hS.mono fun x hx ↦ c011 x hx)

by_cases hv : v = 0
      · rw [hv, semicircleReal_zero_var]
        exact integrable_dirac.mpr (continuous_mul_left t).exp.aestronglyMeasurable
